title: meibomia ciliaris
intro: Meibomia ciliaris, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Meibomia ciliaris is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
